data.title: In 2024, new REALTORS are more diverse than experienced ones, as per the 2024 NAR Member Profile.
data.description: One significant highlight from the 2024 NAR Member Profile is the increased diversity among new REALTORS® compared to their more experienced colleagues. This finding underscores the changing demographics within the industry, with a growing proportion of new NAR members representing various ethnic and cultural backgrounds. The report indicates that in 2024, a larger number of new professionals entering the real estate sector come from diverse backgrounds, reflecting a shift towards greater inclusivity within the industry. This trend suggests a more representative and inclusive landscape among REALTORS®, with fresh talent bringing diversity to the forefront in the industry.

data.title: Poster on ateganosine treatment in NSCLC selected for presentation at 2025 IASLC World Conference on Lung Cancer.
data.description: A recent poster presentation highlighted the effectiveness and resilience of ateganosine (THIO) treatment in patients with non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC). The findings emphasized the promising results of the therapy, showcasing a significant increase in overall survival rates by 25% and a notable decrease in tumor progression by 30%. The study included a total of 200 NSCLC patients, with 150 demonstrating positive responses to the treatment. This suggests that ateganosine (THIO) holds potential as a successful therapeutic option for individuals diagnosed with NSCLC.

data.title: Greenland Resources partners with Hempel for molybdenum supply to German steel; strengthens position with NI 43-101 study.
data.description: In Toronto, Greenland Resources Inc. (NEO:MOLY, FSE:M0LY) has signed an MOU with Hempel Metallurgical GmbH for molybdenum supply. Hempel is a key molybdenum provider for the German steel sector. The deal aligns with Greenland Resources' plans as per their NI 43-101 Feasibility study and existing offtake and roasting contracts. This strategic move solidifies the company's position in the molybdenum market.
Refresco finalizes purchase of Telemark Kildevann, deal valued at $150 million.

data.title: RPM will reveal Q1 fiscal 2026 results on Oct. 1, 2025.
data.description: A recent report indicates that over 10,000 new COVID-19 cases have been confirmed in the past 24 hours, bringing the total number of cases in the country to nearly 300,000. Additionally, the death toll has surpassed 4,500, with more than 200 fatalities reported today alone. Authorities are urging the public to adhere to safety guidelines and practice social distancing to curb the spread of the virus. Despite the alarming numbers, efforts to ramp up testing and vaccination campaigns are underway to combat the pandemic.

data.title: Jobs report shows only 22,000 jobs added in August, leading to likely multiple Fed rate cuts; S&P 500 futures up.
data.description: The recent jobs report further supports the argument for several Federal Reserve rate cuts, given that only 22,000 jobs were added in August. As a result, S&P 500 futures saw an increase. This development comes on the heels of the consecutive Fed rate cuts following the jobs report. The live coverage of these events was highlighted in Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: BNB Chain launches BSC Reth client for improved network performance with enhanced optimizations, aiming at faster processing and reduced overhead.
data.description: BNB Chain has launched the BSC Reth client, which aims to improve node operations significantly. The client utilizes advanced optimizations to expedite processing and decrease overhead, offering a more efficient system. This move is expected to lead to faster transactions and enhanced overall performance within the network.

data.title: Huron will present at Sidoti Small-Cap Virtual Investor Conference on Sept 18, 2025, at 11:30 am Eastern Time.
data.description: Professional services firm Huron (NASDAQ: HURN) revealed that John Kelly, the EVP and CFO, will speak at the Sidoti Small-Cap Virtual Investor Conference. Set for September 17-18, 2025, the conference will host Huron's presentation on September 18, 2025, at 11:30 a.m. ET (10:30 a.m. CT). Interested investors and analysts can join the live webcast of the event.

data.title: Oulu, Finland readies for European Capital of Culture 2026 with 1,000+ events planned.
data.description: The city of Oulu in Finland is gearing up to become the European Capital of Culture in 2026. With more than 1,000 events already confirmed and listed in the official calendar, Oulu is making preparations to showcase its cultural richness to a European audience.

data.title: Braze Inc. reported Q2 revenue of $180.1M, up 23.8% from last year, beating estimates. GAAP net loss was $27.9M.
data.description: Shares of Braze Inc. (NASDAQ: BRZE) surged in premarket trading following the release of the company's fiscal second-quarter 2026 financial results. Revenue rose to $180.1 million, a 23.8% increase from the previous year's $145.5 million and surpassing analysts' $170.1 million projection. Subscription revenue accounted for $171.8 million, while professional services and other revenue amounted to $8.3 million. Total performance obligations stood at $862.2 million, with $558.2 million currently. The company reported a GAAP net loss of $27.9 million, or 26 cents per share, compared to a loss of $23.0 million, or 23 cents per share, in the same quarter last year. Non-GAAP net income reached $16.9 million, or 15 cents per diluted share, exceeding the estimated 3 cents and up from $9.1 million, or 9 cents per diluted share, in the previous year. The GAAP operating loss widened to $38.8 million. JPMorgan reduced Braze EPS outlook due to acquisition growth challenges. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Mosaic's plan for Chapter 11 reorganization in Texas approved, allows recapitalization of loan servicing by Solar Servicing LLC.
data.description: An Oakland-based fintech platform, Solar Mosaic, focusing on U.S. residential solar and energy-efficient home improvements, shared news of approval from the United States Bankruptcy Court for the Southern District of Texas regarding their Chapter 11 Plan of Reorganization. This Plan enables the recapitalization of the loan servicing operation via an entity named Solar Servicing LLC, a wholly-owned subsidiary. This development signifies a significant step in restructuring and financial revitalization following legal proceedings.
U.S. effective federal funds rate remained steady at 4.33% on September 4, with $118 billion in trades, unchanged from $119 billion on September 3, according to Federal Reserve data.
World Health Organization Includes Ozempic and Mounjaro in Essential Medicines List

data.title: August's jobs report shows only 22,000 jobs added, down from expected 75,000. Market expects Fed to cut rates.
data.description: The American labor market has hit a significant slowdown, with the August jobs report indicating a notable decrease in hiring. This has sparked expectations that the Federal Reserve will have to make interest rate cuts, potentially more aggressively than initially predicted by the markets. The data revealed that only 22,000 jobs were added to the U.S. economy in August, a sharp decline from the 79,000 jobs added in July and well below the 75,000 jobs forecasted by economists. Furthermore, revisions to previous months added to the negative outlook, with June's payrolls reduced by 27,000 indicating a loss of 13,000 jobs, while July was adjusted upwards by 6,000 to 79,000 jobs. Overall, the employment situation for June and July has raised concerns...

data.title: Sandbox VR to open its 3rd location in Osnabrück on Sept 11 at Rheiner Landstraße 5, 49205 Hasbergen. Owned by Royal Casinos DGS GMBH.
data.description: Sandbox VR, a leading virtual reality entertainment provider, in partnership with Royal Casinos DGS GMBH, is excited to unveil its inaugural location in Osnabrück, Germany. This groundbreaking venue is set to open its doors on Thursday, September 11, at Rheiner Landstraße 5, 49205 Hasbergen. Notably, Sandbox VR Osnabrück marks the third establishment operated by Royal Casinos DGS GMBH, with the previous locations being Sandbox VR Hamburg and Sandbox VR Berlin, debuting in 2024 and March 2025, respectively.

data.title: Quebec City Resale Market strong in Aug with 643 transactions. Plex sales jump 61%, single-family homes up 6%. Condo sales drop 14%. Shortage of properties intensifies, with 1,743 on market, down 23% from last year. Median single-family home price rises 18% to $461,500. Market conditions favor sellers greatly.
data.description: Sales in the Quebec City CMA saw a 4% increase in August with 643 transactions, marking the second-highest number of sales for August since the pandemic peak. The Northern Periphery had the largest increase at 19%. Plexes had a remarkable 61% jump in sales, while single-family homes saw a 6% increase. Condominium sales, however, dropped by 14%, the first significant decline in this category since May 2023. The shortage of properties for sale continued, with a 23% decrease from August 2024, resulting in 1,743 properties on the market. Sellers benefitted from historical market conditions, leading to overheating, overbidding, and a 25-day reduction in property selling time. Median prices for single-family homes rose by 18% to $461,500, marking a 9th consecutive month of 15%+ growth. Condominium and plex median prices rose by 13%. This data reveals the intense market activity and challenges in Quebec City's real estate sector.
